nasb.text: But as at that time he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit, so it is now also.

esv.text: But just as at that time he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit, so also it is now.

cnv.text: 不過，當時那按著肉體生的，迫害那按著聖靈生的，現在也是這樣。

ccb.text: 当时，那按着人的意愿生的儿子迫害那靠着圣灵生的儿子，现在的情况也和当时一样。

csbs.text: 但正如那由肉体生的当时逼迫了那由圣灵生的，现在也是这样。
